title: Soul RPG Stats
description:
A simple rpg style leveling system and stats mod for minecraft

Still in its early days
sorry for the bad explanation
body:
Soul RPG Stats is a simple customizable RPG style leveling and stats mod for 1.19.2

Created Using MCreator

at the moment it is quite bare bones so bare with the dev process

the first thing to do is to either open the stats gui with the hotkey "P by default" or craft a Stats Orb Like with:
 - 1 Glass Block
 - 1 Amethyst
 - 1 Gold Nugget

The recipe is shapeless so you don't need to worry about the order

xp is currently only added by xp orbs (there will be other methods later)

the xp curve is controlled by gamerules that can be edited by a server admin for full customization
 - EXP Base - The Amount of XP to get from LVL 1 to 2 Default 50
 - EXP Power - The amount the XP requirement increase by each LVL

the XP Curve is calculated with "EXP Base" * ( "Player LVL" ^ "EXP Power" )

two more gamerules are available to server admins:
 - Max Level - The Max Level Someone can have - Default 200
   - -1 and below for infinite Levels
   - 0 and 1 to disable Leveling Up
   - 2 and above to enable
 - SP Per Level - Amount of Skill Points Awarded Per Level - Default 10

Sp or Skill Points can be used to buy Stat Bonuses of the following stats:
 - STR or Strength - Modifies Attack Damage and Knockback
 - DEX or Dexterity - Modifies Attack Speed
 - CON or Constitution - Modifies Health and Natural Armor
 - INT or Intelligence - Currently Useless
 - WIS or Wisdom - Currently Useless
 - CHA or Charisma - Modifies Luck

to be added:
 - More EXP Generation Methods
 - Compatibility With Ars Nouveau
 - More Stat Effects and Modifiers
 - More Admin Commands
 - Compatibility With Curios API

This Mod is free to use in mod packs with attribution
Free to Create Addons for and modify for private use
